prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Alzheimer's Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.3 kg; Height 183.8 cm; BMI 28.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 9.3%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 9.7%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 262mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 255mg/dL; current 227mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.1kg; 9 months ago 95.1kg; 6 months ago 98.9kg; 3 months ago 97.2kg; current 97.3kg), Height (12 months ago 183.8cm; 9 months ago 183.8cm; 6 months ago 183.8cm; 3 months ago 183.8cm; current 183.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 28.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 11mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 605mg/g; 9 months ago 827mg/g; 6 months ago 941mg/g; 3 months ago 725mg/g; current 857mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 104mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
